ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of the component (foreign key to types) */,
  "revision" INTEGER /* Revision of the component (foreign key to revisions) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Manufacturer's part number */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the component was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_revision FOREIGN KEY ("revision") REFERENCES revisions ("revision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the parameter belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "units" INTEGER /* Units of the parameter value (foreign key to units) */,
  "symbol" INTEGER /* Symbol representing the parameter (foreign key to symbols) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or references for the parameter */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance range for the parameter value */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Conditions under which the parameter is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_units FOREIGN KEY ("units") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the component type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the revision belongs to */,
  "revision_name" TEXT /* Name of the revision */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was created */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the unit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symbol */,
  "symbol_name" TEXT /* Name of the symbol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the symbol */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the symbol was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the symbol was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the note belongs to */,
  "note_content" TEXT /* Content of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the note was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the note */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action taken (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_files_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_files_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
